name: Accounting
summary: Knowledge of ledgers, balance sheets, cost controls, and business records.
description: Use this skill to examine books, detect fraud, analyze financial records, and keep accurate accounts for merchants, guilds, or organizations.
notes: May complement Merchant, Finance, or Administration for trade and business tasks.

name: Acrobatics
summary: Balance, tumbling, and body control for falls, narrow footing, and agile movement.
description: Roll for feats such as keeping your feet on unstable surfaces, reducing falling effects, or performing flips and rolls under pressure.
notes: Useful with movement stunts, evasive maneuvers, and cinematic actions at GM discretion.

name: Acting
summary: Pretend convincingly, imitate behavior, and pass yourself off as someone else.
description: Use Acting to lie with your mannerisms, maintain disguises, and sell a role in social scenes or covert operations.
notes: Often opposed by Detect Lies, Body Language, or Observation.
